title: ライアンとの戦い、始まる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen is in the middle of training for
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She witnesses firsthand the drive of Mejiro Ryan,
who's also determined to win the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But McQueen's resolve to gain victory
strengthens. Ryan observes this and proposes the
two of them compete sincerely in the coming
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
McQueen accepts, and the two Mejiro racers
swear to give it their all in the Kikuka Sho.
